name: Ambient Advantage
description: Daily AI intelligence for executives navigating the agentic revolution. A podcast, a daily briefing, an opinion column, and a build log — same lens, four formats — built for C-suite executives, consulting practice leaders, and digital transformation owners. Curated by Chiel Hendriks (Managing Director, PwC Canada).
